visits.note: Patient presents with new onset of fatigue and increased thirst. Physical exam reveals hypertension and hyperlipidemia. HbA1c 7.2, BP 140/90, eGFR 80, LDL 130. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia. Symptoms: Fatigue, Increased thirst. Medications: Metformin 500mg bid, Lisinopril 10mg qd, Atorvastatin 20mg qd.

Patient returns with worsening fatigue and weight gain. Physical exam reveals worsening hypertension and hyperlipidemia. HbA1c 8.5, BP 150/95, eGFR 70, LDL 160. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease (mild). Symptoms: Fatigue, Increased thirst, Weight gain. Medications: Metformin 1000mg bid, Lisinopril 20mg qd, Atorvastatin 40mg qd, Furosemide 20mg qd.

Patient returns with worsening symptoms. Physical exam reveals worsening hypertension and hyperlipidemia. HbA1c 9.0, BP 155/100, eGFR 65, LDL 180. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease (moderate). Symptoms: Fatigue, Increased thirst, Weight gain, Shortness of breath. Medications: Metformin 1500mg bid, Lisinopril 40mg qd, Atorvastatin 80mg qd, Furosemide 40mg qd, Albuterol 2 puffs q4h.

Patient returns with worsening symptoms and worsening kidney function. Physical exam reveals worsening hypertension and hyperlipidemia. HbA1c 9.5, BP 160/105, eGFR 55, LDL 200. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease (severe). Symptoms: Fatigue, Increased thirst, Weight gain, Shortness of breath, Edema. Medications: Metformin 2000mg bid, Lisinopril 60mg qd, Atorvastatin 120mg qd, Furosemide 80mg qd, Albuterol 2 puffs q4h, Epoetin alfa 6000 units qw.

Patient returns with worsening symptoms and worsening kidney function. Physical exam reveals worsening hypertension and hyperlipidemia. HbA1c 9.8, BP 165/110, eGFR 40, LDL 220. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease (end-stage). Symptoms: Fatigue, Increased thirst, Weight gain, Shortness of breath, Edema, Nausea. Medications: Metformin 2500mg bid, Lisinopril 80mg qd, Atorvastatin 160mg qd, Furosemide 120mg qd, Albuterol 2 puffs q4h, Epoetin alfa 12000 units qw, Hemodialysis 3x/week.
